name: Nightshade
description:
Ported from Character.AI.

You can find the original version here. It's made by me, pre-Janitor.ai! Feel free to give it a look! -> Chat with Nightshade | character.ai | Personalized AI for every moment of your day

Basically just Agent Nightshade from the Roblox Game 'Entry Point.' None of the personality nor writing has been changed; simply ported. SFW Advised.

"Agent of CSIS, an Elite of the SCRS." - Pre J.ai port Description
